_comment: Read by Capybara Kids Library at launch. minSupportedVersion hard-blocks the app and is NON-DISMISSIBLE. NEVER set it to a version that is not already live on the App Store and widely adopted - doing so locks out the entire userbase, including App Review, with no path forward. Raise it only AFTER a release is live, never in the same release.

ios.message: We fixed some bugs and added new things!

android.message: We fixed some bugs and added new things!
